title: UI Solidification: Post-Redesign Polish
description: Audit and polish the UI from the lifecycle flow redesign (Epic #119). Focus on consistency, missing coverage, code hygiene, and resilience before moving into A.3 Badge System.

title: A.3 Badge System Milestone
description: Execute all 6 open issues in milestone A.3 - Badge System. 3 waves: #59 → #60 → #61,#62,#63,#64

title: A.6 - Badge Design System Phase 2
description: Currency-style frame overlays, data-driven parameters, text-on-path inscriptions, monogram center, banner/ribbon. 15 issues (#178-#191) in milestone 12. Extends Phase 1 badge designer with full 6-layer SVG composition. Also has parallel work: Evidence Epic #205 (6 issues) and bug #211.

title: A.6 - Badge Design System
description: Currency-style frame overlays, data-driven parameters, text-on-path inscriptions, monogram center, banner/ribbon. Extends the Phase 1 badge designer with the full 6-layer SVG composition. Design doc: docs/plans/2026-02-27-badge-design-system.md
